title: AIR Skills Index
description: Index of reusable skills available in this AIR configuration. Each skill is a self-contained, invocable unit of work defined by a SKILL.md file.

propertyNames.description: Skill identifier key. Must be alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

Skill.description: A reusable, invocable unit of work for an AI agent.

id.description: Unique identifier for this skill. Must match the key in the parent object.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the skill.

description.description: Concise description of what this skill does. Should be clear enough that anyone in the organization can understand its purpose.

path.description: Relative path to the skill directory containing SKILL.md.

references.description: IDs of reference documents this skill depends on. Keeps references DRY across skills.
